message: Node started: Let n be a positive integer. Let k(n) denote the Hamming weight (the number of ones in the binary representation) of the product 2023 * n. The objective is to find the minimum possible value of k(n) over all positive integers n. Note that 2023 can be factored into its prime components to assist in analyzing its properties in base 2. The problem asks for the minimum value of the function f(n) = weight_2(2023 * n) for n in {1, 2, 3, ...}.
